passiveAbilities.name: Tough as Old Boots
passiveAbilities.description: At the start of the Replenish Step this model recovers 2 Wds.

passiveAbilities.name: Recluse
passiveAbilities.description: At the start of the Replenish Step this model gains +1 energy if there are no other models within 3".

passiveAbilities.name: Old Staff
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Piercing or Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

arcaneAbilities.name: Healing
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target restores X+1 Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Trollish Remedies
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target Troll gains [Tough as Old Boots: At the start of the Replenish Step this model recovers 2 Wds.], until end of game.
Target suffers X Wds, then gains +1 energy.
Target restores 3X-1 Wds.
Catastrophe: The target suffers 2 Wds and loses 1 energy.

signatureMove.name: Bog Off!
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move the enemy model 1" directly away from this model.
